title: Zoro and Sanji Enter the Match
description: Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: led by our very lovely porch-chan.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You kicked their butts big time!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: I guess I did single-hand- edly...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Okay, who will be your coach?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Are they really going to fight there?

dialogue.speaker: Tonjit
dialogue.text: It's just the pre- game show.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Nami~ Nico Robin~ There are seats here!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The two fighters of the final round...

dialogue.speaker: Foxy Pirate
dialogue.text: On the left... He's the returning champion...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: With a record of 920 straight wins!!

summary: Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.
